title: 简单火力覆盖 Simple Firepower Coverage
description: Fill the artillery launcher with missiles, then launch the artillery indicator, and saturation artillery coverage will follow
body:
This mod introduces three core items: the Artillery Designator, the Artillery Launcher, and the Missile. Together, they form a tactical artillery system that allows players to coordinate remote explosive strikes with precision and strategy.

The Artillery Designator serves as the targeting device, guiding the Artillery Launcher to a specific location. The Artillery Launcher functions as an automated launch platform, capable of delivering Missiles to designated coordinates. The Missile acts as both ammunition for the launcher and a handheld explosive that can be thrown manually.

To set up the system, first place the Artillery Launcher and load it with Missiles. Then, while holding the Artillery Designator, press Shift + Right-Click to bind it to the launcher. Once linked, simply throw the Designator anywhere within render distance. The launcher will automatically calculate trajectory and launch Missiles toward the target point.

Upon throwing the Designator, detailed strike information will appear in the chat, including the target coordinates, distance from the launcher, artillery spread radius, and estimated time of impact. When a Missile lands—whether launched or thrown—it detonates immediately upon contact with any surface.

Crafting these items is straightforward:
- The Artillery Designator is made by combining a Redstone Torch and White Dye in any arrangement.
- The Missile requires two Sand and two Gunpowder placed diagonally in a 2×2 crafting grid.
- The Artillery Launcher is crafted with a Redstone Block in the center, the space above it left empty, and all remaining slots filled with Cobblestone.
此模组共包含三个物品：火炮指示器，火炮发射器，飞弹。火炮指示器用于引导火炮发射器打击目标点，火炮发射器用于自动投送飞弹，飞弹是火炮发射器所用的弹药，同时也可用于投掷。放置火炮发射器后，在其中填充飞弹，手持火炮指示器按住shift+右键绑定火炮发射器，准备工作完成。接下来只需将火炮指示器投掷在渲染距离内，火炮发射器将根据算法自动向目标点投送爆炸物火力。投掷火炮指示器后，聊天栏会返回目标点坐标，目标点与火炮发射器的距离，以及炮火扩散距离，炮火预计抵达时间等参数。投掷飞弹后，飞弹将在碰到的方块上爆炸。火炮指示器由一个红石火把和白色染料任意摆放合成。飞弹由两个沙子两个火药在2*2空间中任意对角放置同类物品合成。火炮发射器的合成表：中心是红石块，中心上方不放置物品，其余空位用圆石填充。
